rows.notes: Centered page title. Handwriting of heading is legible though last word is archaic/Latin; I read it as 'Sarniensi' (parish name) based on letter shapes and context at top of page.
Left margin date. Clear numeric year and month; no amounts present.

rows.description: W. Taylors Time for L. Tew --

rows.description: Mr. Monsonthorne's fine is not charged to Parish

rows.english_description_with_amount: Notice that Mr Monsonthorne's fine is not charged to the parish; amount not specified.

rows.notes: Amounts read as '02' pounds, '10' shillings, '0' pence. Vertical alignment with other rows is clear; handwriting of name and purpose is legible.

rows.notes: Left margin date marking a new section. Clear year and day-month; no amounts associated.
Centered section heading. Legible Latin phrase indicating miscellaneous payments.
Pounds '08' and shillings '5' are clear. Pence looked like '4' with a small mark adjacent; interpreted as whole pence 4. There is some smudging near the pence column so fraction is left blank.

rows.description: To Robt. Chandler his Bill in full --
rows.notes: Surname 'Chandler' legible. Monetary column is somewhat smudged; there appears to be a '12' in pounds and '1' in shillings but the pence looked like '12' in the scan (which would be invalid). I have interpreted that mark conservatively as pence '2' to keep pence within valid range; this is a low-confidence normalization.
rows.english_description: Payment in full to Robert Chandler in settlement of his bill (nature of the bill not specified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Robert Chandler in full, amounting to £12 1s 2d.
